{{Quote|Luke, in case Sekot hasn't noticed, the Yuuzhan Vong armada is so close we can practically touch it. They also have battle groups orbiting Muscave, Stentat, Improcco, and The Covey.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="TUF">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>}}
'''The Covey''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] between the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Improcco]] and [[Nabatu]] in the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]].<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Ast-stub}}
